response.global_analysis: The video consists of speech by Ninomae Ina'nis and a transition to an outro screen. No vocal music is present in this segment, so the JSON reference is correctly identified as having no music. Subtitles are anchored to the spoken English dialogue and the relevant on-screen text at the end. Pacing is moderate, with some rapid countdowns which are timed precisely to the vocal cues.
